assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md (Step 8) ADF JSON contains a mention node at the end of the content array with "type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id", "text": "@psirt-analyst"} (lines 209-215).

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md (Step 1, line 21) extracts the reporter from the Jira issue: 'Reporter | psirt-analyst (account ID: 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id)'. The Step 8 mention uses this same account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id', demonstrating it was sourced from the Jira issue's reporter field, not from any ProdSec configuration.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: affects-versions.md (Step 3) ADF JSON contains a mention node with "type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:prodsec-mock-account-id", "text": "@prodsec-team"} (lines 122-129).

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3) ADF, the ProdSec mention node (lines 122-129) precedes the "rule" divider (lines 130-132) and the Comment Footnote paragraph (lines 133-157) containing 'This comment was AI-generated by sdlc-workflow/triage-security v0.12.0.'

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration is successfully extracted and used in the Affects Versions correction comment — evidenced by the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' in Step 3 output (Step 0 config extraction → Step 3 usage)
assertion_results.evidence: The Step 3 ADF (affects-versions.md lines 122-129) contains the mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id', confirming the ProdSec Jira account ID was successfully extracted from configuration and applied in the Affects Versions correction comment.
